description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: linux-wheels-x86-64, mac-wheels-x86-64, and win-wheels. Each job builds wheels for Python 3.7-3.9 using cibuildwheel and uploads them to S3. The linux-wheels-x86-64 job runs on ubuntu-latest, the mac-wheels-x86-64 job runs on macos-11, and the win-wheels job runs on windows-latest.
